requirement_topic.en: Angola Grid-Connection Route — IRSEA Licensing, ENDE / RNT Interface Review, IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 安哥拉并网路径——IRSEA许可、ENDE / RNT接口审查、IEC 62116、IEC 61727及50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: 安哥拉併網路徑——IRSEA許可、ENDE / RNT接口審查、IEC 62116、IEC 61727及50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V參數

summary.en: Grid-tied PV inverter use in Angola should be treated as a project approval matter, not only a product certificate matter. IRSEA is the regulator for electricity and water services; ENDE is the distribution utility; RNT and PRODEL commonly appear in transmission and generation project interfaces. For distribution-connected systems, the practical gate is ENDE technical review plus any IRSEA licensing or authorization applicable to the project owner or operator. For utility-scale or donor/EPC-financed projects, the technical specification normally references IEC inverter evidence such as IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 photovoltaic utility interface requirements, and project-specific protection settings. Angola's low-voltage grid context is commonly 50 Hz, 220/380 V, so inverter firmware, protection thresholds, reconnection delay, and anti-islanding settings should be validated for Angola project parameters rather than assumed from China factory defaults.
summary.zh: 在安哥拉使用并网光伏逆变器，应视为项目审批事项，而不仅是产品证书事项。IRSEA是电力和水务服务监管机构；ENDE是配电公用事业；RNT和PRODEL通常出现在输电和发电项目接口中。对于接入配电网的系统，实际门槛是ENDE技术审查，以及适用于项目业主或运营方的IRSEA许可或授权。对于公用事业规模或捐助/EPC融资项目，技术规格通常引用IEC逆变器证据，例如IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727光伏公用电网接口要求以及项目特定保护整定。安哥拉低压电网背景通常为50 Hz、220/380 V，因此逆变器固件、保护阈值、重连延迟和防孤岛设置应按安哥拉项目参数验证，而不能沿用中国出厂默认假设。
summary.zht: 在安哥拉使用併網光伏逆變器，應視為項目審批事項，而不僅是產品證書事項。IRSEA是電力和水務服務監管機構；ENDE是配電公用事業；RNT和PRODEL通常出現在輸電和發電項目接口中。對於接入配電網的系統，實際門檻是ENDE技術審查，以及適用於項目業主或營運方的IRSEA許可或授權。對於公用事業規模或捐助/EPC融資項目，技術規格通常引用IEC逆變器證據，例如IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727光伏公用電網接口要求以及項目特定保護整定。安哥拉低壓電網背景通常為50 Hz、220/380 V，因此逆變器韌體、保護閾值、重連延遲和防孤島設置應按安哥拉項目參數驗證，而不能沿用中國出廠預設假設。

standards_or_laws: IRSEA electricity-sector regulation and licensing role for Angola power services
ENDE distribution-grid technical connection review for distribution-connected projects
RNT / PRODEL interface requirements for transmission-connected or generation projects
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Angola LV grid context commonly treated as 50 Hz, 220/380 V

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for photovoltaic power station connection to the power system, NB/T 32004 inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 inverter technical requirements, and domestic anti-islanding test results. These documents are built around Chinese grid procedures and Chinese project acceptance. They do not by themselves establish IRSEA licensing compliance, ENDE connection acceptance, RNT interface approval, or lender/EPC acceptance in Angola.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408逆变器技术要求以及国内防孤岛测试结果。这些文件基于中国电网程序和中国项目验收，不能单独证明符合安哥拉IRSEA许可、ENDE接入受理、RNT接口批准或贷款方/EPC验收。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408逆變器技術要求以及國內防孤島測試結果。這些文件基於中國電網程序和中國項目驗收，不能單獨證明符合安哥拉IRSEA許可、ENDE接入受理、RNT接口批准或貸款方/EPC驗收。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China domestic grid evidence does not transfer automatically to Angola. Exporters should prepare a project-specific Angola grid package: IEC 62116 anti-islanding report, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, inverter parameter sheet for 50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V operation, Portuguese-language installation and commissioning instructions, protection setting file, and a statement showing whether firmware differs from the China factory configuration. Submit the package through the Angola project developer, EPC contractor, licensed installer, or utility interface responsible for ENDE/RNT review.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内并网证据不能自动转移至安哥拉。出口商应准备项目特定的安哥拉并网包：IEC 62116防孤岛报告、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V运行参数表、葡萄牙语安装和调试说明、保护整定文件，以及说明固件是否不同于中国出厂配置的声明。该包应通过负责ENDE/RNT审查的安哥拉项目开发商、EPC承包商、持证安装方或公用事业接口提交。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內併網證據不能自動轉移至安哥拉。出口商應準備項目特定的安哥拉併網包：IEC 62116防孤島報告、IEC 61727公用電網接口證據、50 Hz / 220 V / 380 V運行參數表、葡萄牙語安裝和調試說明、保護整定文件，以及說明韌體是否不同於中國出廠配置的聲明。該包應通過負責ENDE/RNT審查的安哥拉項目開發商、EPC承包商、持證安裝方或公用事業接口提交。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-tied projects where IRSEA authorization, ENDE distribution connection, RNT transmission interface, or project-owner technical approval applies
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China project procedures but does not transfer to Angola IRSEA / ENDE / RNT acceptance

source.publisher: IRSEA (Instituto Regulador dos Serviços de Electricidade e de Águas)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Angola grid connection as a project-specific regulatory and utility review. China GB/T 19964, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 37408 evidence is not a substitute for IRSEA licensing, ENDE/RNT interface review, IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, and Angola-specific firmware settings. Confirm the current Portuguese-language submission path with IRSEA, ENDE, the project EPC, or the appointed owner engineer before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将安哥拉并网视为项目特定的监管和公用事业审查。中国GB/T 19964、NB/T 32004和GB/T 37408证据不能替代IRSEA许可、ENDE/RNT接口审查、IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据及安哥拉特定固件设置。出货前请向IRSEA、ENDE、项目EPC或指定业主工程师确认当前葡萄牙语提交路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將安哥拉併網視為項目特定的監管和公用事業審查。中國GB/T 19964、NB/T 32004和GB/T 37408證據不能替代IRSEA許可、ENDE/RNT接口審查、IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727公用電網接口證據及安哥拉特定韌體設置。出貨前請向IRSEA、ENDE、項目EPC或指定業主工程師確認當前葡萄牙語提交路徑。

requirement_topic.en: Angola Solar Market Context — EPC / Lender Technical Specifications for Utility and Rural Electrification PV
requirement_topic.zh: 安哥拉太阳能市场背景——公用事业和农村电气化光伏的EPC / 贷款方技术规格
requirement_topic.zht: 安哥拉太陽能市場背景——公用事業和農村電氣化光伏的EPC / 貸款方技術規格

summary.en: Angola is an oil-dependent economy diversifying its power mix through large solar and rural electrification programmes, including Biópio, Baía Farta, and provincial PV projects developed through EPC and donor/lender-backed structures. In practice, inverter acceptance for these projects is often governed by the employer's requirements, EPC specification, owner engineer comments, lender procurement rules, and IEC-referenced technical schedules, in addition to Angolan regulatory and utility review. Documentation is commonly expected in Portuguese or with controlled Portuguese translations.
summary.zh: 安哥拉是依赖石油的经济体，正在通过大型太阳能和农村电气化计划实现电力结构多元化，包括Biópio、Baía Farta及省级光伏项目，这些项目通过EPC和捐助方/贷款方支持结构开发。实际操作中，除安哥拉监管和公用事业审查外，逆变器验收通常受业主要求、EPC规格、业主工程师意见、贷款方采购规则及IEC引用技术清单约束。文件通常需要葡萄牙语版本或受控葡萄牙语译本。
summary.zht: 安哥拉是依賴石油的經濟體，正在通過大型太陽能和農村電氣化計畫實現電力結構多元化，包括Biópio、Baía Farta及省級光伏項目，這些項目通過EPC和捐助方/貸款方支持結構開發。實際操作中，除安哥拉監管和公用事業審查外，逆變器驗收通常受業主要求、EPC規格、業主工程師意見、貸款方採購規則及IEC引用技術清單約束。文件通常需要葡萄牙語版本或受控葡萄牙語譯本。

standards_or_laws: Angola Ministry of Energy and Water renewable-energy and electrification project context
Project EPC / employer's requirements for utility-scale PV and provincial solar projects
IEC-referenced inverter safety, grid, EMC, and performance schedules in financed project specifications

summary.en: China domestic project references, factory type-test reports, CQC/CGC certificates, and GB/T or NB/T grid certificates can help establish manufacturer capability but are not normally enough for Angola-financed EPC submissions. Owner engineers and lenders may require direct IEC reports, English or Portuguese certificates, serial-number traceability, factory audit records, warranty terms, spare-parts commitments, cybersecurity or monitoring-system documentation, and project-specific parameter files.
summary.zh: 中国国内项目业绩、工厂型式试验报告、CQC/CGC证书以及GB/T或NB/T并网证书可帮助证明制造商能力，但通常不足以用于安哥拉融资EPC提交。业主工程师和贷款方可能要求直接IEC报告、英文或葡萄牙语证书、序列号可追溯性、工厂审核记录、质保条款、备件承诺、网络安全或监控系统文件以及项目特定参数文件。
summary.zht: 中國國內項目業績、工廠型式試驗報告、CQC/CGC證書以及GB/T或NB/T併網證書可幫助證明製造商能力，但通常不足以用於安哥拉融資EPC提交。業主工程師和貸款方可能要求直接IEC報告、英文或葡萄牙語證書、序列號可追溯性、工廠審核記錄、質保條款、備件承諾、網路安全或監控系統文件以及項目特定參數文件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: For Angola EPC and financed projects, supplier qualification is broader than standards equivalence. Build a submittal matrix that maps every inverter certificate and test report to the employer's requirements, including IEC 62109-1/-2, IEC 62116, IEC 61727, IEC 62920 or IEC 61000 EMC evidence, environmental ratings, monitoring protocol, warranty, spare parts, Portuguese-language manuals, and Angola firmware settings. Obtain written acceptance from the EPC or owner engineer before shipment.
gap.zh: 差距：对于安哥拉EPC和融资项目，供应商资格范围宽于标准等同。应建立提交矩阵，将每份逆变器证书和测试报告映射至业主要求，包括IEC 62109-1/-2、IEC 62116、IEC 61727、IEC 62920或IEC 61000 EMC证据、环境等级、监控协议、质保、备件、葡萄牙语手册及安哥拉固件设置。出货前应取得EPC或业主工程师的书面接受。
gap.zht: 差距：對於安哥拉EPC和融資項目，供應商資格範圍寬於標準等同。應建立提交矩陣，將每份逆變器證書和測試報告映射至業主要求，包括IEC 62109-1/-2、IEC 62116、IEC 61727、IEC 62920或IEC 61000 EMC證據、環境等級、監控協議、質保、備件、葡萄牙語手冊及安哥拉韌體設置。出貨前應取得EPC或業主工程師的書面接受。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific but mandatory in practice where the procurement contract, lender conditions, EPC specification, or owner engineer requires IEC-referenced inverter evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese domestic certificates are supporting evidence only and do not create acceptance under Angola project procurement rules

source.publisher: MINEA (Ministry of Energy and Water, Angola)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Angola solar procurement often turns on EPC, owner-engineer, and lender acceptance, not only statutory product conformity. Do not assume a China GB/T or NB/T inverter certificate will satisfy the project schedule. Prepare an IEC-referenced, Portuguese-ready submittal package and obtain written acceptance from the Angola project chain before manufacturing, shipping, or configuring firmware.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 安哥拉太阳能采购通常取决于EPC、业主工程师和贷款方接受，而不仅是法定产品合格评定。不要假设中国GB/T或NB/T逆变器证书会满足项目技术清单。应准备IEC引用、可用于葡萄牙语提交的文件包，并在生产、出货或配置固件前取得安哥拉项目链条的书面接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 安哥拉太陽能採購通常取決於EPC、業主工程師和貸款方接受，而不僅是法定產品合格評定。不要假設中國GB/T或NB/T逆變器證書會滿足項目技術清單。應準備IEC引用、可用於葡萄牙語提交的文件包，並在生產、出貨或配置韌體前取得安哥拉項目鏈條的書面接受。
